creator: bsd@dino.sk
text:
(In reply to Evgeniy Khramtsov from comment #4)

Accidentally, I came through this issue as well. I think the problem is in graphics/libglvnd default option X11 value is OFF, while in graphics/cairo the same option is ON. I use generally default options with minor modifications (like DOCS OFF for ports I am not interested in more than just build-and-forget manner).
